components.longDescriptionKey: A medical facility combined with a triage center, operating as both a crew casualty station and a staging post for medical teams to heal wounded crewmembers.
components.name: Battle Dressing Station

components.longDescriptionKey: Berthings provide additional crew to the ship, which are required to operate systems, weapons, and other compartments.
components.name: Berthing

hulls.longDescriptionKey: The Alliance Raines-class is a solid all-around warship, boasting 4 mount points and a generous swath of internal modules and compartments. In terms of overall performance, the Raines has moderate armoring, speed, and agility, while being able to function as a jack-of-trades warship.
hulls.name: Raines Frigate

notes: Long prose descriptions are intentionally omitted; localization keys are preserved.

missiles.bodyFunctionalDescription: multi-purpose hybrid missile designed to penetrate point defense grids
missiles.name: SGM-H-2 Body

missiles.bodyFunctionalDescription: high speed hybrid missile designed to strike heavy targets
missiles.name: SGM-H-3 Body
